sentences.text: Every lesson ahead runs on the same five-step loop — learn it once, apply it everywhere:
Research: who's the reader, what do they want, what words do they use?
Brief: reader, action, angle, tone — written down before any drafting
Draft: AI generates multiple versions from your brief — never just one
Edit: you cut, sharpen, and fact-check; AI polishes on your instruction
Test: variants go head-to-head in the real world; results feed the next brief
